claims.text: Prototype reuses KV-cache across sessions to cut local inference latency.

trust.note: The evidence does not specifically address whether the prototype reuses KV-cache across sessions to cut local inference latency. The GitHub repository provides general information about the project but does not confirm or deny the specific claim about KV-cache reuse.
